title: Delete dead source files (~1200 lines)
description: Delete the following files that are not imported, built, or referenced anywhere: src/commands.ts (27 lines), src/polyfills.js (9 lines), src/stdio-only.ts (41 lines), src/http-server-new.ts (203 lines), src/http-simple.ts (270 lines), src/smithery.ts (228 lines), src/smithery-minimal.ts (187 lines), src/smithery-entry.ts (268 lines), src/mcp/litemcp.ts (~49 lines), src/websocket/client.ts, src/platforms/macos/integration.ts, src/utils/stdio-transport.ts, src/utils/helpers.ts, src/interfaces/index.ts, src/config.js. Also remove the only consumer of the now-deleted code (src/middleware/rate-limit.middleware.ts:2 imports from config.js → switch to app.config.ts).
validation: Each file removed with `git rm`. The consumer file (rate-limit.middleware.ts) is updated to import from src/config/app.config.ts. Run `grep -r 'commands.ts' src/__tests__ __tests__` to confirm no broken references.
